summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shivani Verma portfolio website. All major features working correctly including backend API, frontend UI, contact form integration, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: API accepts invalid/empty data without validation
minor_issues.impact: Low - allows submission of empty forms but doesn't break functionality

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Contact form POST endpoint working with proper response structure
Contact form GET endpoint retrieving messages
Hero section renders with name 'Shivani Verma', tagline, profile photo, and CTA buttons
Sticky header with all navigation links and Book a Call button
My Message section displays with pull-quote and editorial text
Background section with 4 career cards in bento grid layout
Speaking section with 3 topic cards and 4 'Why Choose Me' items
Mentoring section with image, individual mentoring items, and team training items
Quote/testimonial banner section with quote text
Contact section with dark background, form fields, and send button
Contact form submission works - successful POST to /api/contact endpoint
Footer with name, role, LinkedIn and email links
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Mobile responsiveness - hamburger menu appears and works on small screens
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Contact form shows success message and clears fields after submission
